title: Diffusion of EV technology in Latin America
description: We examine the diffusion patterns of electric vehicle technology across six Latin American countries from 2015-2024.

title: Mobile money adoption in sub-Saharan Africa
description: A panel study of mobile money diffusion and its effect on small business formation.

title: Patents and trade in emerging markets
description: Cross-country evidence on the link between IP protection and trade flows.

title: Congestion pricing in mid-sized cities
description: Field-experimental evidence from three pilot programs.

title: Modal substitution after bike-share rollout
description: Difference-in-differences estimates of mode shift after public bike-share launch.

title: ML-augmented choice models
description: Hybrid discrete-choice models with neural network components for utility specification.

title: Reinforcement learning and risk preference
description: An experimental study of RL agents under shifting risk environments.

title: Lab evidence on prosocial behavior
description: Public-goods game results from a large multi-site replication.

title: Gig work and bargaining power
description: Survey evidence from platform workers across three countries.

title: Industrial policy in the AI era
description: A comparative study of national AI strategies and downstream firm formation.
